name: Fried Mushrooms
recipeInstructions: Season the mushrooms with salt and pepper. Marinate the mushrooms in buttermilk. Marinate for 30 minutes, then drain. Heat oil in a saucepan until hot. In a shallow dish, mix flour and cornmeal together. Season the mixture with seasonings of choice. Coat the mushrooms completely in the seasoned flour/cornmeal mixture. Fry the mushrooms in the hot oil until golden brown, about 2 to 3 minutes per batch. Remove the mushrooms from the oil and drain on a paper-lined plate. Season again with salt and pepper.
